h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner progressively corrects arrow directions using the food-first rule without changing course.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure; the tutor consistently repeats the food-first rule without adaptation.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no adaptation to a revised framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no adaptation to a revised framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure; the tutor consistently repeats the food-first rule without adaptation.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure; the tutor consistently repeats the food-first rule without adaptation.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to express annoyance at the identical numbers while the tutor reinforces the need for labels.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The bracket-and-label route has done its job, but it no longer settles the risk: the two 2s still look interchangeable. New gate: each answer needs a receipt sentence before it can stand.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor explicitly replaces the bracket/label method with receipt sentences in response to the learner's persistent dissatisfaction.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: The bracket-and-label route has done its job, but it no longer settles the risk: the two 2s still look interchangeable. New gate: each answer needs a receipt sentence before it can stand.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor explicitly replaces the bracket/label method with receipt sentences in response to the learner's persistent dissatisfaction.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: The bracket-and-label route has done its job, but it no longer settles the risk: the two 2s still look interchangeable. New gate: each answer needs a receipt sentence before it can stand.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor explicitly replaces the bracket/label method with receipt sentences in response to the learner's persistent dissatisfaction.
